name: The Metro Exodus | Hope's End
description:
Back to back, how i see?... Try to survive in this cruel world full of mutants and ruined civilizations...

Inspired by Metro 2033 series.

You can start how you please. Free scenario.

I made it as canonical as possible. Might be glitchy + doesn't have main characters from original, so just Metro Exodus RPG.

Feel free to leave your opinion!
creator: Welemir
